title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and less technical builders ship quality code through agents. Founded by Michael Truell, Cursor has grown to 700 people and serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies, partnering closely with Anthropic.
writeup: This video profiles Cursor, an AI-native coding platform founded by Michael Truell that uses agents to help engineers and less technical builders ship quality code. It documents the company's scale: a team of 700 people, adoption across more than 60% of Fortune 500 companies, and a close partnership with Anthropic. The takeaway is a picture of how agent-based code generation has moved into production use at large enterprises.
